phase3_findings.description: query-summary foreign-nonce CLI coverage (cross-run contamination branch)

test_first_gate.decision: regression test for existing query-summary foreign-nonce state=None reset
test_first_gate.evidence: mutation-verified RED: removing the state=None reset renders the real summary (state=ok token=eat_...) under a foreign nonce -> assertion fails

test_first_gate.decision: regression test for query-arm --write-landed no routing
test_first_gate.evidence: mutation-verified RED: inverting the write-landed comparison routes no->file arm -> assertion fails
mutation-verified RED: neutralizing the verdict-not-in-_VERDICTS guard makes the transposed call raise KeyError instead of 'no-parseable-verdict'

sweep_evidence.status: fix-triggered class-sweep over the test_gap class (query-subcommand CLI-seam coverage); delta is test-only + 1 comment reword. Step 3.5 gate: CLEAN by inspection (no new production guard/predicate/parser; all 3 test additions mutation-proven RED; comment reword verified accurate vs _GROUNDS).

phase3_findings.description: 3 LOW error-handling notes (all fail-closed/over-alarming/moot): --draft-file omission on file-arm epoch; query-arm routes from None state; emit-body does not thread digest_failed (verified safe)
2 imprecise-comment nits (no documented_falsehood): issue_token docstring omits 'ground'; _repo_root docstring attributes root= that lives on state_path

5 untested-breadcrumb test_gaps for fail-loud guards (empty-stdin, epoch-hash-failure, file-arm dispatch guards, user-decline missing --surface, record-degraded no-such-round); over-grade calibrated Important->Suggestion (single-source empirical over-grader; all guards fail loud, no live fail-open)

over_grade_calibration.evidence: single-source from empirical over-grader pr-test-analyzer, uncorroborated, no Phase-2 FAIL; the agent itself states all guards fail loud (non-zero + breadcrumb) so the risk is a regression silently deleting a guard, not a live fail-open -> shape 1 + shape 3. Recorded technical evaluation; no promotion warranted.

shadow.park_calibration_gate: clean: no parked finding matched a mis-grade shape (the re-raised --draft-file finding is LOW/over-alarming, matching the parked grade; not a fail-open guard, breadcrumb-overclaim, or unhonorable-deferral)
shadow.note: Convergence-time shadow after iter 3. No new Critical/Important survives over-grade calibration; no documented_falsehood; requesting-code-review and code-reviewer both clean/'ready to merge'. Remaining findings are the diminishing-returns tail (untested fail-loud breadcrumbs + comment-precision nits in a 2031-line CLI). Decide outcome 1: converge. Post-shadow edit gate: HEAD == reviewed_sha (66194aee).
